title: Update many Boards with a new automation at once
excerpt:

posts.author: mchurchill (Michael Churchill)
posts.cookedHtml:
We leverage a template for generating new Project Boards and we review the automations, structure, columns in the template regularly to see if updates are needed based on new features, changing user requirements, etc.

When we find some new automations that will be helpful, we add them to the template so that all new Project Boards can use the updates.

However, I am interested in an easy process to retrofit existing Project Boards with the new automations as well without having to go Board by Board to add the automation.

Would like a “Group Update” feature to push a new Automation or Column to any boards selected (or all board of a certain type).
